rows.label: qev087202_MSG0001
rows.name:
This is where Secretary Nagi's
last transmission came from.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087202_MSG0002
rows.name: Right. His escort team had arrived,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087202_MSG0003
rows.name: and they were engaged with the Growth here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087202_MSG0004
rows.name: Hmm... But Tatsu not see anyone.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087202_MSG0005
rows.name: Elma! I'm picking up a residual heat signal![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087202_MSG0006
rows.name: This battle must've went down recently.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087202_MSG0007
rows.name:
The signal just spiked.
What the heck is going on?[ST:wait ]
